risks.title: Source-headers run rewrites large portion of .coderef index
risks.mitigation: Run on CODEREF-CORE only; commit .coderef/ snapshot before and after for diff review

risks.title: Export edge addition changes graph schema consumers expect
risks.mitigation: Additive only — new edge type; existing consumers ignore unknown edge types

risks.title: what-imports fix may silently change CLI output format
risks.mitigation: Add test snapshot before fix; compare output before and after

risks.title: ai-prompt-generator truncation may drop tokens that downstream tools rely on
risks.mitigation: Structure-preserving truncation — preserve function signatures, truncate bodies only

decision_records.decision: Phase sequencing: source-headers → tree-sitter verify → export edges → what-imports → rag-search → viz fields → ai-truncation
decision_records.rationale: Source-headers unblocks RAG (highest leverage). Tree-sitter verify is read-only (safe). Remaining phases are independent and ordered by downstream impact.

decision_records.decision: Tree-sitter field verification is a READ-only audit phase — no code changes unless gaps found
decision_records.rationale: Avoid scope creep. Verification may reveal that enrichment fields already populate; fix only what is confirmed missing.
